report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages: SocialFi & Creator Tokens Guide (filling zero-coverage gap in $2.4B SocialFi sector covering Farcaster, Lens, Friend.tech) and Crypto Options Strategies Guide (advanced strategies: covered calls, straddles, spreads, iron condors with DeFi/CeFi platform comparison).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: SocialFi sector has grown to $2.4B market cap with 300% YoY growth; Farcaster at ~60K DAU with $1B valuation, Lens Protocol migrated 650K profiles to ZK-powered L2 with $31M funding
Crypto options market expanding rapidly — Deribit at $24B+ volume, DeFi options led by Derive (70% market share), Aevo on custom L2, Panoptic enabling permissionless options on Uniswap
Both topics identified as clear zero-coverage gaps on degen0x — no existing pages for SocialFi/creator tokens, and no specific options strategy guides despite having 4 general options intro pages
March 2026 trending narratives: RWA tokenization ($26.48B), perpetual DEX surge (Hyperliquid $4T cumulative), Titan Builder $34.5M MEV extraction event, institutional DeFi maturation into OnFi

sections.title: Content Created
items: SocialFi Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 12 min read): 9 sections covering SocialFi fundamentals, tech stack, Farcaster deep dive (Frames, Snapchains, Hub architecture), Lens Protocol (ZK L2, 650K profiles, 28M connections), Friend.tech creator keys model and sustainability debate, CyberConnect/Phaver/Open Campus, Web2 vs SocialFi comparison table, risks & challenges (including user retention volatility), getting started guide, 6-question FAQ

Crypto Options Strategies Guide 2026 (~3500 words, 15 min read): 9 sections covering covered calls with BTC/ETH examples, protective puts, bull/bear call spreads with max profit/loss formulas, straddles vs strangles comparison table, iron condors for range-bound income, DeFi vs CeFi platform comparison (Deribit/Aevo/Derive/Panoptic), risk management with Greeks (delta/theta/vega), IV crush risks, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: SocialFi page: title 'SocialFi Guide 2026: Creator Tokens & Farcaster | degen0x' (57 chars), target keywords: SocialFi, creator tokens, Farcaster, Lens Protocol, decentralized social media, Friend.tech

Options page: title 'Crypto Options Strategies 2026: Calls, Spreads & More | degen0x' (59 chars), target keywords: options strategies, covered calls, straddles, spreads, iron condors, DeFi options, Deribit, Aevo
Both pages include: Article JSON-LD schema, FAQ JSON-LD schema (6 questions each), OpenGraph article type with publishedTime/modifiedTime, Twitter summary_large_image cards

Internal links: SocialFi links to /learn/account-abstraction, /learn/onchain-identity-reputation-guide-2026, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/defi-guide; Options links to /learn/defi-options-trading-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide, /tools/options-calculator, /learn/perpetual-futures-funding-rate-guide, /learn/delta-neutral-strategies
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for controlled rollout
